req.title: Announcement rollout — variant 5
req.statement: A system-admin shall publish an org-wide announcement to employees in chosen departments; publishing without any department selection shall be rejected. Additionally, the action requires two-factor authentication confirmation.

doc.reasoning: The requirement has three distinct test-worthy behaviours: (1) happy-path publish with valid department selection + 2FA confirmation, (2) rejection when zero departments are selected (error pathway), and (3) boundary on department selection — exactly one department chosen (minimum valid selection). A fourth test covers the 2FA state-transition (pre-2FA vs post-2FA confirmation). Heuristics applied: EP for the normal publish flow, NEG for the no-department rejection, BVA for the single-department boundary, and STC for the 2FA confirmation state transition.

tests.name: test_publish_announcement_with_valid_departments_and_2fa
preconditions: At least two departments exist in the organisation
2FA is enabled for the admin account
actions: Fill in announcement title and body
Select two or more departments from the department picker
Complete 2FA confirmation with a valid OTP
expected: Announcement record is created in the system
Employees in selected departments receive a notification
tests.executable:
def test_publish_announcement_with_valid_departments_and_2fa(page, admin_session, db_cleanup):
    page.goto("/org-announcements/new")
    <helper_fn: fill_announcement_form>(page, title="Q3 Update", body="All hands on deck.")
    <helper_fn: select_departments>(page, departments=["Engineering", "Marketing"])
    page.click("[data-testid='publish-btn']")
    <helper_fn: complete_2fa>(page, secret=admin_session["totp_secret"])
    page.wait_for_url("**/org-announcements/**")
    assert "/org-announcements/" in page.url
    announcement_id = <helper_fn: extract_id_from_url>(page.url)
    record = <helper_fn: api_get>(f"/api/org-announcements/{announcement_id}", token=admin_session["token"])
    assert record["status"] == 200
    assert record["json"]["departments"] == ["Engineering", "Marketing"]
    notifications = <helper_fn: get_pending_notifications>(announcement_id)
    assert len(notifications) > 0

tests.name: test_publish_announcement_rejected_when_no_department_selected
actions: Fill in announcement title and body
expected: Error message indicates department selection is required
trace: R-WEB-091 — error pathway: 422 when no departments selected
tests.executable:
def test_publish_announcement_rejected_when_no_department_selected(page, admin_session):
    page.goto("/org-announcements/new")
    <helper_fn: fill_announcement_form>(page, title="No Dept Test", body="Body text.")
    # Explicitly ensure no department is selected
    <helper_fn: clear_department_selection>(page)
    page.click("[data-testid='publish-btn']")
    # 2FA dialog must NOT appear
    assert not page.is_visible("[data-testid='2fa-dialog']"), "2FA should not appear before validation"
    error_locator = page.locator("[data-testid='dept-validation-error']")
    assert error_locator.is_visible()
    assert "department" in error_locator.inner_text().lower()
    resp = <helper_fn: api_post>(
        "/api/org-announcements",
        payload={"title": "No Dept Test", "body": "Body.", "departments": []},
        token=admin_session["token"]
    )
    assert resp["status"] == 422

tests.name: test_publish_announcement_with_exactly_one_department
preconditions: At least one department exists in the organisation
2FA is enabled for the admin account
actions: Fill in announcement title and body
Select exactly one department from the department picker
Complete 2FA confirmation with a valid OTP
expected: Announcement record is created with exactly one department
Employees in the single selected department receive notifications
trace: R-WEB-091 — boundary: minimum valid department count = 1
tests.executable:
def test_publish_announcement_with_exactly_one_department(page, admin_session, db_cleanup):
    page.goto("/org-announcements/new")
    <helper_fn: fill_announcement_form>(page, title="Single Dept Boundary", body="BVA test.")
    <helper_fn: select_departments>(page, departments=["Finance"])
    page.click("[data-testid='publish-btn']")
    <helper_fn: complete_2fa>(page, secret=admin_session["totp_secret"])
    page.wait_for_url("**/org-announcements/**")
    assert "/org-announcements/" in page.url
    announcement_id = <helper_fn: extract_id_from_url>(page.url)
    record = <helper_fn: api_get>(f"/api/org-announcements/{announcement_id}", token=admin_session["token"])
    assert record["status"] == 200
    assert record["json"]["departments"] == ["Finance"]
    assert len(record["json"]["departments"]) == 1

tests.name: test_publish_announcement_2fa_state_transition_cancel_then_confirm
preconditions: 2FA is enabled for the admin account
actions: Fill in announcement title and body
Click Publish button — 2FA dialog appears (state: AWAITING_2FA)
Cancel the 2FA dialog — state transitions back to FORM
Click Publish button again — 2FA dialog appears again
Submit valid OTP — state transitions to CONFIRMED
expected: After cancel, form remains editable and no announcement is created prematurely
After valid OTP submission, announcement is created successfully
System transitions: FORM -> AWAITING_2FA -> FORM -> AWAITING_2FA -> CONFIRMED
trace: R-WEB-091 — state transition: cancel and retry 2FA
tests.executable:
def test_publish_announcement_2fa_state_transition_cancel_then_confirm(page, admin_session, db_cleanup):
    page.goto("/org-announcements/new")
    <helper_fn: fill_announcement_form>(page, title="STC 2FA Test", body="State transition.")
    <helper_fn: select_departments>(page, departments=["Operations"])
    # First publish attempt -> 2FA appears
    page.click("[data-testid='publish-btn']")
    assert page.is_visible("[data-testid='2fa-dialog']")
    # Cancel -> return to form state
    page.click("[data-testid='2fa-cancel-btn']")
    assert not page.is_visible("[data-testid='2fa-dialog']")
    assert page.is_visible("[data-testid='publish-btn']")
    # Ensure no premature record created
    premature = <helper_fn: api_search_announcements>(title="STC 2FA Test", token=admin_session["token"])
    assert premature["json"]["total"] == 0
    # Second publish attempt -> complete 2FA
    page.click("[data-testid='publish-btn']")
    <helper_fn: complete_2fa>(page, secret=admin_session["totp_secret"])
    page.wait_for_url("**/org-announcements/**")
    assert "/org-announcements/" in page.url
